display.purpose: Page titles, greeting headline, section headings, and any number that represents achieved progress. Never on functional chrome.

body.purpose: All form labels, inputs, buttons, nav labels, and running text.

shadows.name: glass-elevation
shadows.purpose: Default elevation for every liquid-glass surface (cards, tiles, auth form, stat cards).

shadows.name: tile-selected-glow
shadows.purpose: Deeper Granite-tinted shadow under a selected exercise tile.

shadows.name: slider-thumb
shadows.purpose: Small tinted shadow on the draggable slider thumb.

shadows.name: nav-elevation
shadows.purpose: Upward-cast soft shadow separating the glass bottom nav from content.

motion.name: tile-select
motion.purpose: Gradient fill crossfades in via a separate overlay layer since CSS cannot transition between a flat color and a gradient directly.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action on a screen — Loggen, Eintrag speichern, Fertig.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 18px; font: 600 1rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5A7684, #395B50); color: #FFFFFF; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), filter 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5A7684; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Any non-primary action — Fortschritt, Überspringen, Abmelden. Stays solid white, never glass.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid rgba(90,118,132,0.18); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 18px; font: 600 1rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; background: #FFFFFF; color: #1F2F16; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 160ms ease, transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: rgba(31,47,22,0.3); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Liquid Glass Card
components.description: Generic translucent, blurred surface for dashboard items, forms, and stat rows — hue-tinted shadow, inner highlight edge.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.65); border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(90,118,132,0.16), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.6); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-card-title { font: 400 1.1rem 'Instrument Serif', serif; color: #1F2F16; } .ds-card-sub { font: 400 0.85rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: rgba(31,47,22,0.62); }

components.name: Exercise Tile — Selected
components.description: A chosen exercise in the picker grid — glass base with the brand gradient crossfaded on top, deeper tinted shadow.
components.css: .ds-tile { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; padding: 8px; border-radius: 16px; font: 500 0.8rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-tile-selected { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5A7684, #395B50); color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid transparent; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(57,91,80,0.28); }

components.name: Exercise Tile — Unselected
components.description: An available-but-not-chosen exercise — liquid glass, translucent over the off-white canvas.
components.css: .ds-tile { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; padding: 8px; border-radius: 16px; font: 500 0.8rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-tile-unselected { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); color: #33423B; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.65); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(90,118,132,0.16), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text/number/date field — solid white, not glass, for legibility.
components.css: .ds-input { font: 400 1rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(90,118,132,0.18); border-radius: 10px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #1F2F16; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5A7684; outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Weight Slider
components.description: Range input for weight/reps/sets — gradient-filled thumb with a tinted shadow, scales up on drag.
components.css: .ds-slider { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 100%; height: 6px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(90,118,132,0.18); outline: none; } .ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5A7684, #395B50); border: 2px solid #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(90,118,132,0.4); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-slider:active::-webkit-slider-thumb { transform: scale(1.15); }

components.name: Bottom Navigation
components.description: Fixed glass bottom nav on a warm off-white canvas — translucent, blurred, softly shadowed upward.
components.html: HomeFortschrittIch
components.css: .ds-bottom-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.68); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.65); box-shadow: 0 -4px 24px rgba(90,118,132,0.1); padding: 10px 16px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; text-decoration: none; color: rgba(31,47,22,0.62); font: 400 0.7rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 4px 16px; border-radius: 12px; } .ds-nav-item-active { color: #5A7684; }

narrative.overview: Fitnesstracker's second design pass moves deliberately away from its first identity (dark-by-default, Void Black + Electric Blue) toward something welcoming. The canvas is a warm off-white, never stark white and never dark. Every surface that used to be a flat bordered card is now liquid glass: translucent, soft-edged, gently blurred, with a hue-tinted shadow instead of a hard black one. The brand color is a five-step blue-to-green family (Lavender → Powder Blue → Blue Slate → Granite → Evergreen) that reads as one continuous, calming gradient.
keyCharacteristics: Warm off-white canvas, light-only — no dark mode
Liquid-glass surfaces everywhere: translucent, blurred, hue-tinted shadow, inner highlight edge
One locked accent family (five-color blue-to-green gradient), never mixed with an unrelated hue
Instrument Serif (explicitly brand-chosen) for milestone numbers and headings, Inter for everything functional

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Every accent in the app draws from the same five-color family. No unrelated hue is ever introduced, including for the success indicator.

rules.name: The Contrast-Checked Gradient Rule
rules.body: The primary gradient runs Blue Slate → Granite, not Lavender or Powder Blue, because the lighter two colors fail white-text contrast (Powder Blue + white ≈ 2.25:1).

rules.name: The Serif-Is-Earned Rule
rules.body: Instrument Serif only renders numbers or headings that represent a milestone or a title — never a button, a form label, or a badge.

rules.name: The Tinted-Shadow Rule
rules.body: No shadow in this system is pure black. Every shadow's rgba uses Blue Slate or Granite as its color channel.

rules.name: The Reduced-Transparency Fallback Rule
rules.body: Every glass surface has a prefers-reduced-transparency fallback that swaps translucency for a solid white fill and a plain hairline border.

dos: Do keep every accent inside the five-color Lavender-to-Evergreen family — no outside hue.
Do use Blue Slate → Granite (never Lavender or Powder Blue) for any surface needing white text over the gradient.
Do tint every shadow toward Blue Slate or Granite — never a plain black drop shadow.
Do keep buttons and form inputs solid and opaque even while cards and tiles are glass.
Do provide a prefers-reduced-transparency solid-fill fallback on every glass surface.
donts: Don't reintroduce dark mode — this app is light-only by deliberate decision.
Don't use Powder Blue or Lavender as a button or tile-selected background — both fail WCAG AA contrast with white text.
Don't add steps, sleep, calories, hydration, or a social/friends feed.
Don't use Instrument Serif for buttons, labels, badges, or any functional chrome.
Don't apply a pure-black or ungraded gray shadow anywhere.
